questionHtml:
A boat with an output engine power of 15 kW moves through water at a speed of 10 m s-1. What is the resistive force acting on the boat?

A. 0.15 kN

B. 0.75 kN

C. 1.5 kN

D. 150 kN

meta.title: A boat with an output engine power of 15 kW moves through water at a speed of 10 m s-1. What is the resistive force acting on the boat? A. 0.15 kN B. 0.75 kN C. 1.5 kN D. 150 kN
